mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acceleration_data ( sensor_id, acceleration_value, collect_time, create_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{sensorId}, #{accelerationValue}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, acceleration_value AS accelerationValue, collect_time AS collectTime FROM acceleration_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
